tags.name: Public Sitemap API
tags.description: Endpoints for fetching sitemap data (post slugs, category slugs) by domain

tags.name: Public Contact API
tags.description: Endpoints for submitting contact messages from website domains

tags.name: Public Post Integration API
tags.description: Endpoints for fetching public posts specific to a website domain

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

post.description: Submits a new contact message for a specific website domain.

get.summary: Get all post slugs for sitemap
get.description: Returns all published post slugs with their category slugs and last modified dates for a given domain and language.

get.summary: Get all category slugs for sitemap
get.description: Returns all category slugs with last modified dates for a given domain and language.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

get.description: Retrieves all published post translations for a given website domain and language.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

get.summary: Get a single post by slug
get.description: Fetches the details of a specific post using its category slug, post slug, website domain and language.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: The language code for the translation

get.summary: Get all categories and their top 12 posts by domain
get.description: Retrieves all categories and up to 12 published posts for each, filtered by website domain and language.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
